---
format: gfm
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.qmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(emoji)
```

## `r emoji_glue(":shrug::monkey:")` Note on "careless chimpanzee" project name

Because project titles change all the time with revisions, rewriting, and peer review, we used [{codename}](http://svmiller.com/codename/) to generate an wu-tang internal-to-us project name that won't change.

```{r}
#| label: code-name
#| eval: FALSE

library(codename)

codename_message()
#> code name generated by {codename} v.0.5.0. R version 4.5.2 (2025-10-31 ucrt).

> codename(type = "ubuntu", seed = "markov")
# > "careless chimpanzee"
```
